text.title: Logstash Pipeline Configuration and Tuning Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end.

step.name: catalogue-formats
step.action: Enumerate distinct log formats + sample lines per format.

step.name: design-pipelines-yml
step.action: Split into heavy + routing pipelines; one .conf per format.

step.name: compose-filters
step.action: Author grok / json / date filters per format with `tag_on_failure`.

step.name: add-pii-masking
step.action: Add mutate gsub filter BEFORE the elasticsearch output for every sensitive field.

step.name: tune-and-deploy
step.action: Set workers + batch.size; enable DLQ; TLS + auth on output; deploy + measure with _node/stats.
